title: Spicy Species
description: Adds new foods, nature, mobs and enhances other mods
body:
Do you want to explore the overworld, nether or end? Build a candy store or a caramel castle? Dive into the ocean? Make the lightstone and blaze powder... plantation?? Build an elevator made from flying jellyfishes? Or even fight new boss in the end? This mod is for you!

Features:

- New plant species
- Confectionery
- New ice cream flavors and white chocolate for Neapolitan
- Stuff from upcoming Eetle Update for Endergetic Expansion
- New illager for Savage & Ravage
- Srapped jellyfishes and jelly torches for Upgrade Aquatic
- Craftable banner patterns for other mods
- Scrapped underwater mob for Environmental
- Painting textures for Gallery

And more
